draftRules.text: Jhin + Yuumi is considered one of the worst ADC + Support combos. Yuumi's kit doesn't synergize with Jhin's reload mechanic.
Sivir's Spell Shield neutralizes poke mages. Be careful with skillshot-heavy picks.
Xayah + Rakan have special synergy. Strong laning phase and teamfight combo.
Kai'Sa thrives with engage supports that help stack her plasma.
Senna is extremely vulnerable to hook supports (Blitzcrank, Thresh, Nautilus, Pyke).
Enchanter supports struggle against engage supports. Position carefully and save disengage abilities.
Caitlyn + Morgana/Lux: Long roots guarantee trap headshots.
Kog'Maw needs heavy peel to survive. Lulu and Braum are his best protectors.
Kalista + Thresh is a classic combo — Thresh can be thrown in with Kalista's ultimate.
Samira needs engage support to unlock her full potential. Nautilus, Leona, and Thresh are best.
Twitch + Lulu: Hypercarry + attack speed buffs. Strong scaling combo.
Lucian + Nami: Early game power spike with double damage amplification.
APC bot lanes have strong poke but are vulnerable to all-ins. Don't let them push you under tower.
Zyra's plants can block hooks — use them to body-block skillshots.
Enchanters are very squishy vs hook supports. One hook = death.
Vayne can also be played top lane. If you see Vayne in draft, consider if she's ADC or top.
Nilah can be played jungle. Watch for unusual jungle pathing.
Draven dominates most marksmen early with raw damage. Pick Caitlyn for range, Varus for poke, or Tristana for safety. Never pick Vayne/Kai'Sa into him.
Caitlyn wins through lane pressure. Pick Varus to match poke, Draven for all-in, or Ezreal for safety. Avoid short-range ADCs.
Vayne needs to scale. Pick Draven/Lucian to punish early, Caitlyn for range, or Ashe for vision. Don't let her farm safely.
Lucian wants early kills. Pick Caitlyn for range, Draven to trade back, or Sivir to block his burst. Don't pick Kog'Maw.
Ezreal plays safe and pokes. Pick Draven to all-in, Twitch to flank, or Sivir to push him in. Don't let him scale safely.
Ashe wins with utility and slows. Pick Draven to out-damage, Ezreal for mobility, or Caitlyn for range.
Jhin wins with burst and utility. Pick Draven to out-trade, Tristana to jump his reload, or Varus for poke.
Jinx scales hard. Pick Draven/Lucian to pressure early, Tristana to match scaling, or Caitlyn to out-range.
Kalista wins with mobility. Pick Ashe for slows, Draven for raw damage, or Caitlyn for range to deny her jumps.
Kog'Maw needs protection. Pick Draven/Lucian for early burst, Tristana to jump him, or Varus for poke.
Zeri wins with kiting. Pick Draven for early damage, Caitlyn for range, or Lucian for burst to shut her down.
Engage supports want to all-in. Pick Morgana (black shield), Janna (disengage), or Braum (peel) to counter.
Hook supports punish bad positioning. Pick Morgana (black shield), Sivir (spell shield), Ezreal (mobility), or Zyra (plants block hooks).
Poke supports win through pressure. Pick sustain (Soraka/Nami) or hard engage (Leona/Nautilus) to counter.
Enchanters protect and sustain. Pick poke (Zyra/Xerath) or engage (Leona/Nautilus) to out-pressure and deny their scaling.
Ziggs wants to siege. Pick Ezreal for mobility, Varus for poke, or Draven for early burst. Don't let him take your tower.
Veigar scales infinitely. Pick Sivir (spell shield), Ezreal (mobility), or Draven (early pressure) to counter.
Seraphine wins in teamfights. Pick Pyke/Blitz/Nautilus for hook engage, or Zeri to dodge her skillshots.
Ziggs is a siege god. Pick Sivir to push back, Ezreal to dodge, or Tristana to all-in him before he scales.
Brand is a damage support. Pick sustain (Soraka/Nami) to heal his poke, or engage to burst him down.
Zyra's plants block hooks. Pick Miss Fortune to clear plants with Q, Caitlyn for range, or Xerath to out-poke her.
Senna wins through poke and scaling. Pick engage supports to burst her, or hard engage to lock her down.
Pyke is a roaming assassin. Pick Morgana to block his hooks, or Alistar to peel his engages. Ward river and ping MIA.
Yuumi is annoying but weak early. Pick engage supports to burst her ADC, or enchanters to match her sustain.
APCs are weak early. Pick Draven/Lucian for early pressure, or Sivir to push them in. Don't let them scale.
Lulu struggles into lane bullies. Play safe, scale up, and peel for your ADC in teamfights.
Morgana's black shield counters hooks. Use it to enable your ADC to play aggressively and deny their pick potential.
Morgana counters Leona with black shield. Bait out the shield before engaging, or look for roams to other lanes.
Braum's E can block hooks. Use it to protect your ADC and counter-engage with Q and R.
Janna's Q and R counter engage supports. Cancel their engages and peel for your ADC.
Assassins like Zed, Fizz, and Akali excel against immobile mages. Look for early kill pressure.
Control mages like Galio and Vex counter assassins with CC and survivability. Consider building Zhonya's.
Engage junglers pair well with burst/control mids like Ahri, Orianna, and Syndra for easy follow-up.
Galio is a strong counter to AP-heavy team comps. Consider an AD mid like Zed, Yasuo, or Lucian.
Tanky champions like Malphite and Galio can neutralize AD assassins with armor/MR and CC.
Scaling junglers like Master Yi and Shyvana struggle against early pressure. Farm safe and concede early objectives.
Vex's passive counters dash-heavy champions. Pick her into mobile team comps.
Carry junglers need frontline. Consider a tank jungler or ask team for frontline.
Global roamers will pressure side lanes. Warn your team and match their roams.
Kassadin outscales most AP mids. Pick an AD mid (Zed, Lucian) or apply early pressure to delay his scaling.
Yasuo needs knockup setup for his ultimate. Ensure your team has reliable knockups (e.g., Malphite, Gragas, Nautilus).
Tanks like Ornn and Malphite are strong into AD bruisers. Build armor and survive the lane. Pick Ornn or Malphite.
Assassins like Evelynn, Rengar, and Kayn excel against immobile carries. Look for picks.
AP junglers like Lillia, Diana, and Nidalee shred tanks. Build magic damage.
Engage supports and control mages pair well with dive junglers like Vi, Jarvan, and Lee Sin.
Early game junglers will look for early ganks. Ward and play safe early.
Strong early junglers will invade. Coordinate with lanes for vision and response.
Strong dragon control junglers. Prioritize early drakes for team buffs.
Early game junglers should prioritize Rift Herald for turret plates and snowball.
Strong early junglers will invade you. Place wards at your buffs and ask for help from lanes.
Duelists like Fiora and Camille shred tanks with true damage. Win through split push. Pick Fiora or Camille.
Ranged champions (Teemo, Jayce, Gnar) can kite melee bruisers. Play safe and poke. Pick Teemo, Jayce, or Gnar.
If your team has multiple AD threats, Malphite is a strong pick against full AD comps. Pick Malphite.
Split pushers require team coordination. Match their split with grouped plays or counter-split. Pick a champion that can match their split (Fiora, Jax, Tryndamere).
Poppy's W blocks dashes. Consider Poppy against mobile champions. Pick Poppy.
AP top laners need MR counter building. Consider picking an AD duelist (Fiora, Camille) or buying Hexdrinker.
